reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The loop condition should be i < n (or i <= n-1). Using i <= n accesses a[n], which is out of bounds for an array of size n (indices 0 to n-1). This causes undefined behavior and likely prints garbage or extra numbers.
